name: eventhub-frontend
description: AI skill for the EventHub frontend (Next.js 14 App Router).
notes: Next.js 14 App Router with Tailwind CSS.
State management via Zustand (useAuthStore + useCartStore in lib/store.ts).
API client in lib/api.ts with Axios, 401 interceptor clears token and redirects to /login.
Auth tokens stored in localStorage, sent as Authorization: Bearer header.
Three role sections: /admin (login + dashboard + vendors + events + reports + disputes), /vendor (login + dashboard + events + payout), /events (public browse).
API responses expect {success, data, message} format from core-api.
Frontend runs in Docker via npm run dev (not production build) to avoid stale .next cache issues.
All pages handle loading states and API errors with try/catch blocks.
